## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? Why do you need it?

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've tried.

```ts
// How would the new API look?
```

## Additional Context

Links to relevant discussions, prior art, or related issues.
